title: Denying me access to my provider
body: Denying me access to my provider. Will not let me schedule an apt. Been requesting for 7 days and their help desk, just keeps denying the request. HORRIBLE CUSTOMER SERVICE - DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME WITH THIS COMPANY!!

title: Complete disaster of customer service
body: Complete disaster of customer service. Dr's are great and no complaints there but the terrible customer service puts that on the back burner. If you need to make any change or give information it is messed up and takes weeks to resolve. I placed my account on hold while finding another provider and they continued to charge my card on file. I would use Hone as a last resort and find any other provider if possible. The monthly price doesn't give you much. I am now paying $20 less for better service and that includes the medication. They are over priced and they under deliver.

title: The service was great until I actually subscribed
body: The service was great until I actually subscribed. Almost impossible to get any type of customer support. I was charged for prescriptions that never shipped. Feels scammy to me.

title: Stay away from this company!
body: I had blood drawn for t labs. I never received lab results! All their communication is limited to some impersonal robotic test messages. No one to talk to. They've asked me to use their website to schedule an appointment with some DR and verify my ID but their website HAS NO OPTIONS for anything outside of purchasing the same labs I already paid for! Stay away from this company!

title: Don't forget to delete your account
body: Don't forget to delete your account. Renewed my membership, emailed them the same day, and they refuse to give me my money back. So now I've paid for a 'membership' for the next year for something I won't use.

title: Horrible company
body: Horrible company. It's a scam. They take your money and never send you a prescription. Look on the websight they don't provide a phone number. They fraudulently billed my credit card. I cancelled the charges.

title: No call. No show.
body: No call. No show. Now I'm chasing my money for a refund. Originally requested a 9 AM – 11 AM sampling at my place. Ended up getting 6 AM-8 AM. Whatever. So they don't show up. No call. No-show. Waste of time and effort and now I need to chase down my refund. Avoid.

title: Overpriced prescriptions and high monthly subscription fees
body: I signed up for the service and got all my blood work which was great. Then I met with the Dr and she prescribed a ton of hormones and thyroid meds. My first purchase was overbilled and went through 3 times so 150, 149 and 150 again. There's no phone customer support so you need to send through their chat and wait for them to get back to you. They corrected the issue, but then also sent a prescription for something i didn't order and charged me. To make up they discounted my first 3 months membership to 75 per month. After the 3 months, I thought 150 per month was a lot to pay so I reach

title: I feel scammed I got nothing
body: I feel scammed I got nothing it's been almost a month now they wanting more

title: AI support is God awful
body: I sent in my blood test and scheduled a consultation. I had the consultation with my doctor and he never updated my chart or prescribed the meds he said would help me. After 2 days of waiting for someone real to reach me I was told I need to reschedule. Rather than do their jobs, they refunded my money. I went to a doctor in person and had everything handled in less than a hour. This company is a joke and rely heavily on ai. If you want to deal with bullshit, I recommend Hone Health.

title: Home health has no reps to speak to
body: Home health has no reps to speak to over the phone. Texting was an option when I first started a year ago but that does not work now. It's all email. There is almost no oversight when it comes to deliveries or ordering tests. They only use quest diagnostics now, not so when I first started and I live in Cedar Rapids with only one quest location available in a city 67 miles away one way. I can not contact my physician directly. I have received bad batches of testosterone, which they did give me a portion off my subscription fee as compensation but they were very late in getting me my replacemen

title: Multiple issues - Hone's Customer Service is Brutal
body: Issue 1. Scheduled and went to lab, they never delivered the lab requisition. There is no phone number to call and only an email so I had to reschedule and come back. Issue 2. I confirmed my refill was processing on the 12th. Never got word of shipping and checked in on 18th and was told processing again. Talked to Dr in my telework appt and they also put in a request. Online platform says no refills when oddly everyone seems to not be able to solve anything. I sit here today out of medicine with no shipment confirmation and everything stuck on their platform. Look elsewhere folks if you're wa

title: Haven't received my prescriptions for testosterone since March 30th
body: Haven't received my prescriptions for testosterone since March 30th. Rx not sent to Costco pharmacy. I am no longer able to speak to a person directly. Hone Health is hard to speak with on the phone and prefers to play email tag.

title: Unnoticed drug interactions, medicine vials arriving hot in mail, can't terminate account
body: Dr was nice but sent a supplement that interacts badly with all my medication after going over my medication with me, and no returns no refund but was offered discount for following monthly services. My test results were in front of them. It's affordable but please check with at least a pharmacist before taking what they send. They are not looking for drug interactions. Also vitamin B12 arrived HOT in mail over 105 in the mailbox ... after contacting they said the Dr said It SHOULD be fine. It took a long time to receive the vitamin too, I do not recommend i dont think they care much they push

title: Very unprofessional
body: Very unprofessional, my first consultation was canceled 10 minutes before it was supposed to start. The second one was canceled within two hours. Medication delivery was delayed multiple times.

title: At first everything was fine
body: At first everything was fine, and even would have recommended them. I changed banks and when I went to update the billing, it wouldn't let me until it was rejected by the bank. It then wouldn't let me update for 3 days of failed charges. I got that handled, and again there was a problem with billing. So another 3 days of failed charges to update again. Now I have ran out of the Rx, and have to resort to paying someone else to get my Rx. Why because as an extremely busy professional working 80-100 hours a week, I do not have the option to answer my phone when they call, and they have no one you

title: Went to Quest Diagnostics on the given day and Hone never sent in the order
body: Went to Quest Diagnostics on the given lab appointment day and Hone never sent in the order.

title: My actual message to Hone Health
body: I was told I would be given 3 subscription options and since the only option given to me was the premium membership and with that and the cost of medication, I was going to be charged for over $300 monthly. You could have shared this information up front and saved wasting my time with the consult and doing the bloodwork. This feels like a scam, considering I am not able to cancel my subscription anywhere on your site or reach a real human on the phone or a live chat. Good luck giving other people sub-par medical care and treatment. No thanks. Please confirm r

title: Difficult, expensive program that doesn't work
body: When I first signed up my Testosterone was 517 after 3 months of 'treatment' my T went down to 368. I feel worse than I did when I started! The first prescription they sent was the wrong dosage of enclomidphene. Takes forever to get your medication delivered. It is expensive, doesn't work and is hard to cancel. I highly recommend looking elsewhere - Not a good value nor does it work.

title: Absolutely awful experience
body: Absolutely awful experience. Had 2 minute video visit with a totally uninterested doctor. They do not have a phone number for you or your pharmacy to contact. I've paid $300 for their 'services' and have received two prescriptions, they haven't sent my refills into my pharmacy even though I've made about 10 requests. This is a scam.
